author: deusexnatura
name: Pair-Geometric Value Projection on PR #1855 accepted stack

43.note: Seed completed, but the full remote stdout log was not copied before the JarvisLabs instance paused; metrics are recovered from terminal polling output.

technique_summary: Starts from the accepted PR #1855 stack and replaces the dense trained/stored attention value projection with pair-geometric value construction over normalized hidden-state halves: v = a*w0 + b*w1 + (a-b)*wd + (a+b)*ws. The validated run uses the algebraically collapsed signed form, which is equivalent to learned coefficients on the two pair halves while removing dense W_v storage/training.

based_on.upstream_name: 11L XSA + LQER + SparseAttnGate + SmearGate (BOS-fixed) + PolarNS Muon + 9-hparam stack

candidate_changes: Adds PAIRGEOM_V_ENABLED, PAIRGEOM_V_ABSDIFF, PAIRGEOM_V_RMS, and PAIRGEOM_V_COLLAPSE flags.
Removes dense W_v from kv_bank when PAIRGEOM_V_ENABLED=1 and stores per-layer pairgeom_v_bank scalars instead.
Uses the same pair-geometric V path in the normal forward pass and legal TTT LoRA paths.
Skips attn.c_v Hessian/GPTQ calibration when dense W_v is absent.
Keeps the accepted PR #1855 training recipe otherwise aligned for controlled comparison.
claim_boundary: This is a high-impact replacement of attention value projection only. It does not replace Q/K projections, attention score dot products, output projection, or MLP matrix products. The two completed seed summary does not beat the reproduced PR #1855 standard control on BPB, but it is a clean architectural ablation with a smaller artifact.
